params.payoutBps: Prize split in basis points [1st, 2nd, 3rd]                     Must sum to 10000 - PLATFORM_FEE_BPS = 9500

params.rankedEntries: Entry IDs ordered by rank (1st to last), desc composite score.                      Pass ONLY eligible (non-disqualified) entries.                      Disqualified entries are handled separately — their fees                      remain in the pool (redistributed to winners).                      Oracle must exclude disqualified entries before calling.

cancelChallenge(bytes32).notice: Cancel a challenge and enable refunds for all entrants.         Use for: insufficient entries, technical failure, admin decision.

claimPrize(bytes32).notice: Winners call this to claim their USDC prize.         Pull pattern — prizes are not pushed to winners automatically.

claimRefund(bytes32).notice: Claim a refund for a cancelled challenge.

closeEntries(bytes32).notice: Close entries and move challenge to Scoring state.         Called after endTime passes.

commitComposite(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32).notice: Commit a composite score hash before revealing.         Called by oracle after calculate-ratings completes.

createChallenge(bytes32,uint256,uint256,.notice: Create a new challenge with entry fee and prize structure.

disqualifyEntry(bytes32).notice: Disqualify an entry (integrity violation).         Disqualified entries' fees stay in pool (redistributed to winners).

finalizeChallenge(bytes32,bytes32[]).notice: Finalize a challenge: rank entries by composite score,         assign placements and prize amounts, unlock claims.

payEntry(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Pay entry fee to enter a challenge.         Caller must have approved this contract to spend USDC first.

platformFeeBalance().notice: Accumulated platform fees available for withdrawal

revealComposite(bytes32,uint8,bytes32).notice: Reveal a composite score, verifying against the commitment.
